name: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform

name: Eventarc

name: Compute Engine

name: Cloud Run
description: A fully managed, serverless execution platform that automatically scales containerized HTTP endpoints up or down to zero.

name: Cloud Run functions
description: A lightweight, event-driven function-as-a-service (FaaS) platform designed to run small snippets of code without server management.

name: App Engine
description: A fully managed platform-as-a-service (PaaS) tailored for building and deploying scalable web applications in standard languages.

name: Cloud TPUs
description: High-performance, custom-built Tensor Processing Units designed specifically to accelerate deep learning and AI models.

name: Cloud GPUs
description: High-performance NVIDIA graphic processors attached to virtual machines to accelerate computational chemistry, modeling, and AI.

name: AI Hypercomputer

name: Cluster Director

name: Batch
description: A fully managed scheduling service designed to run mass batch-processing workloads, simulations, and data transformations.

name: Capacity Planner

description: A highly secure bare-metal environment that allows organizations to run legacy VMware workloads on Google Cloud data centers.

name: SAP on Google Cloud
description: A certified infrastructure suite designed to securely execute, scale, and analyze business operations run on SAP HANA environments.

name: Cluster Toolkit

name: Shielded VMs

description: A fully managed node hosting service designed to simplify the development, scaling, and execution of Web3 applications.

name: Blockchain RPC

name: Spanner
description: A relational database providing up to 99.999% SLA availability, global transaction consistency, and unlimited horizontal scaling.

description: A high-performance, PostgreSQL-compatible relational database designed for analytical acceleration and enterprise transaction processing.

description: A local, downloadable software edition of AlloyDB designed to run inside private datacenters or on edge computing hardware.

name: Cloud SQL
description: A fully managed database engine supporting MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server with automated backups, replicas, and updates.

name: Spanner Graph
description: A multi-model graph database engine built on Spanner to run highly integrated network queries at global scale.

name: Bigtable
description: A low-latency NoSQL wide-column database with built-in nearest neighbor (k-NN) vector search for analytical and operational workloads.

name: Datastore
description: A highly scalable, document-based NoSQL database optimized for high-performance application querying.

name: Memorystore for Redis

name: Memorystore for Valkey
description: A fully managed in-memory cache supporting Valkey 7.2 & 9.0, vector search, JSON documents, and custom CA certificates.

name: Memorystore for Memcached

name: Database Center
description: An AI-assisted unified console designed to manage, secure, and optimize databases across an organization-wide fleet.

name: Database Migration Service
description: An automated database migration service that converts schema structures and replicates live data using Gemini guidance.

name: BigQuery
description: A serverless, highly parallel data warehouse designed to analyze petabytes of structured data using SQL syntax.

name: Knowledge Catalog
description: A semantic registry that catalogues, indexes, and describes analytical assets and corporate datasets across GCP.

name: Looker
description: An enterprise platform for modeling data, exploring trends, and embedding interactive analytical dashboards into web applications.

name: Data Catalog
description: A secure metadata management catalog designed to search, tag, and discover datasets across multiple analytics engines.

name: Dataform
description: A development environment designed to model, test, and execute complex SQL workflows inside analytical data warehouses.

name: Datastream

name: Cloud Data Fusion
description: A visual ETL tool designed to design, manage, and execute complex data integration pipelines.

name: Managed Airflow
description: A fully managed orchestrator based on Apache Airflow designed to run, schedule, and monitor workflows.

name: Dataproc Metastore
description: A metadata repository service designed to catalog, govern, and coordinate open-source Hive and Spark database tables.

name: Managed Spark

name: Dataflow
description: A stream and batch data-processing pipeline executor based on the unified Apache Beam programming model.

name: Managed Kafka
description: A managed cluster hosting service designed to capture, stream, and process real-time event logs using Apache Kafka.

name: Pub/Sub
description: A highly reliable, horizontally scaling event-messaging bus designed to ingest real-time operational streams.

name: BigQuery Data Transfer

name: BigQuery Migration
description: A suite of translation and execution tools designed to speed up migration from legacy database architectures to BigQuery.

name: Cloud Storage
category: Storage, Backup, and Disaster Recovery Catalog
description: A highly secure, durable, and globally scalable object storage platform offering multiple tier classes based on access frequency.

name: Persistent Disk
category: Storage, Backup, and Disaster Recovery Catalog
description: Highly reliable, network-attached block storage volumes designed for Compute Engine and GKE workloads.

name: Hyperdisk
category: Storage, Backup, and Disaster Recovery Catalog
description: Next-generation block storage designed to scale IOPS and throughput dynamically, independent of compute engine size.

name: Local SSD

name: Filestore

name: Backup and DR Service

name: Storage Transfer Service

name: Transfer Appliance

description: A secure, high-capacity physical hardware storage device sent to client locations to transfer petabytes of data offline.

name: Virtual Private Cloud (VPC)

name: Cloud NAT
description: A serverless NAT service that allows internal instances without public IPs to securely fetch external resources.

name: Network Service Tiers
description: A tiered routing model that lets organizations optimize cost and performance using either the Premium global network or Standard internet routing.

name: Cloud Number Registry

name: Network Connectivity Center

name: Cloud VPN
description: An IPSec VPN service that securely connects on-premises networks to GCP VPCs over public internet channels.

name: Cloud Interconnect
description: Dedicated, enterprise-grade physical fiber connections between external core networks and Google Cloud data centers.

name: Cloud Router
description: A dynamic routing service that exchanges border gateway protocol (BGP) routing tables between GCP and customer endpoints.

name: Cloud DNS
description: A highly reliable, low-latency global Domain Name System (DNS) designed to manage internal and public domains.

name: Cloud Load Balancing
description: High-performance, distributed load balancers designed to scale traffic across regions and enforce health checks.

name: Service Extensions
description: A customization interface that runs custom WebAssembly filters inside Google Cloud load-balancing pipelines.

name: Cloud Domains
description: A domain registration and management service integrated with Cloud DNS to handle domain lifecycles.

name: Cloud CDN
description: A low-latency content delivery network designed to cache static assets and web applications at edge points of presence.

name: Media CDN
description: A highly optimized global streaming and media storage delivery system built on YouTube's underlying network.

name: Cloud NGFW
description: A cloud-native, next-generation firewall providing intrusion detection (IPS), deep packet inspection, and protocol analysis.

name: Secure Access Connect
description: A secure access service designed to establish zero-trust connections from corporate end-user machines to cloud networks.

name: VPC Service Controls
description: Cryptographic perimeter zones that restrict data and API access to authorized IP ranges and designated networks.

name: Google Cloud Armor
description: A global security engine that provides WAF defenses and DDoS mitigation for HTTP/S edge targets.

name: Network Intelligence Center
description: A network diagnostics dashboard designed to run reachability analyses, track packet flows, and verify connectivity paths.

name: VPC Flow Logs
description: Detailed network event logs that record IP traffic flows passing through virtual network interfaces.

name: Gemini Cloud Assist
description: An AI-assisted co-pilot designed to help administrators design architecture, troubleshoot, and optimize costs across the app lifecycle.

name: Advisory Notifications
description: A centralized notification panel that displays security vulnerability alerts and administrative warnings.

name: Cyber Insurance Hub
description: An assessment portal designed to generate verified security posture profiles to secure favorable cyber insurance policies.

name: Google Security Operations
description: An integrated threat intelligence, analysis, and security event platform designed to ingest and parse security logs.

name: Security Command Center
description: A unified posture-management engine that analyzes configurations, detects active attacks, and maps compliance gaps.

name: Access Context Manager
description: A security engine that enforces context-aware access rules based on IP address, device state, and user location.

name: Certificate Authority Service
description: A highly available private CA service designed to manage, issue, and rotate custom digital certificates.

name: Identity and Access Management
description: A security framework designed to define granular user and service-account resource access permissions.

name: Certificate Manager
description: A control plane designed to acquire, manage, distribute, and rotate public SSL certificates for load balancers.

name: Identity-Aware Proxy (IAP)
description: A reverse proxy that authenticates and verifies user state before granting access to web apps, without requiring a traditional VPN.

name: Fraud Defense
description: A fraud mitigation engine designed to identify anomalous programmatic attempts, credential abuse, and transactional risk.

name: Web Risk
description: A security API that compares URLs against a centralized, constantly updated index of known phishing and malware sites.

name: Access Transparency
description: A logging service that records administrative interventions, verifying when Google Support access is authorized on customer environments.

name: Audit Manager
description: An automated governance tool designed to capture access logs and compile evidence records for regulatory audits.

name: Cloud Audit Logs
description: Immutable system logs that record all administrative changes and data read/write accesses made across GCP.

name: Endpoint Verification
description: A security extension designed to collect, verify, and report hardware security characteristics of connecting end-user devices.

name: Assured Workloads
description: Pre-configured environment templates that apply strict regulatory compliance constraints (such as FedRAMP or HIPAA).

name: Cloud Asset Inventory
description: A highly consistent database catalog that records all active cloud resources and their historic configurations.

name: Organization Policy Service
description: A declarative governance tool that allows administrators to apply strict operational rules across an enterprise hierarchy.

name: Cloud External Key Manager
description: An encryption interface that allows GCP to use cryptographic keys hosted outside of Google's network.

name: Cloud HSM
description: A highly secure cloud-hosted hardware security module (HSM) designed to store and manage cryptographic keys.

name: Cloud Key Management Service
description: A key management service designed to generate, rotate, and control cryptographic keys used to encrypt cloud data.

name: Confidential Computing
description: Hardware-isolated virtual machines that encrypt customer data in memory while it is being processed by the CPU.

name: Secret Manager
description: A centralized vault designed to securely store API keys, database passwords, and private certificates.

name: Sensitive Data Protection
description: A suite of tools to discover, classify, and redact sensitive database rows and text files, preventing PII leaks.

name: Cloud Logging
description: A highly scalable log ingestion and query engine designed to store and analyze operational logs from application components.

name: Cloud Monitoring
description: An infrastructure monitoring service that collects operational metrics, displays dashboards, and triggers alerting policies.

name: Cloud Trace
description: A distributed tracing system that collects latency data from microservices, helping developers optimize application response times.

name: Error Reporting
description: A diagnostics service that automatically clusters, reports, and notifies developers of runtime application crashes and exceptions.

name: Cloud Profiler
description: A low-overhead profiling tool that continually analyzes CPU and memory consumption across production codebases.

name: Cloud Identity
description: A directory service that acts as the core identity provider (IdP) for employees, applications, and service accounts.

name: Identity Platform
description: A developer-focused customer identity and access management (CIAM) platform designed to secure user sign-in flows.

name: Managed Active Directory
description: A highly available Microsoft Active Directory environment hosted on Google Cloud infrastructure.

name: Service Catalog
description: An internal portal that allows administrators to curate and distribute pre-approved cloud configurations to internal teams.

name: Cloud Billing
description: A billing system that tracks service consumption, forecasts expenditures, and exports billing data to analytical endpoints.

name: Committed Use Discounts
description: A programmatic discount model offering lower resource pricing in exchange for committing to stable consumption limits over a fixed term.

name: FinOps Hub
description: A central dashboard designed to monitor cloud spend, analyze anomalies, and suggest resource right-sizing strategies.

name: Cloud Quotas
description: An administrative interface designed to monitor, track, and request modifications to operational service usage limits.

name: Carbon Footprint
description: A sustainability dashboard that calculates and reports the carbon emissions associated with an organization's cloud infrastructure.

name: Infrastructure Manager
description: A fully managed execution engine designed to deploy cloud environments using declarative Terraform configurations.

name: Terraform on Google Cloud
description: Pre-configured, Google-supported providers and blueprints designed to automate the deployment of cloud infrastructure.

name: Cloud DevKit for Terraform

name: Pulumi Provider
